title: Cobblemon Ores x Golden Days
description: Gives the ores in Cobblemon a redesign to match with the Golden Days Base & Programmer Art Aesthetics
body:
**PLEASE NOTE!** This Pack is designed to make the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) ores match with the [Golden Days Base](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days) Resource Pack
- [miimiku](https://modrinth.com/user/miimiku): Ore Textures (Overlayed on-top of the Block Textures)
- [PoeticRainbow](https://modrinth.com/user/PoeticRainbow): Block Textures

# 🌈Pack Contents
![All of the Cobblemon Ores and Stones Retextured on-top of Golden Days Base block textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af13138f264ac9d305c24cf60b25d464e9aefe19.png)

Re-Textures these blocks in the order shown in the **image above** ↑

<details>
<summary>Stone Ores</summary>

- Sun
- Fire
- Ice
- Leaf
- Moon
- Shiny
- Thunder
- Water
- Dawn
- Dusk


</details>


<details>
<summary>Deepslate Ores</summary>

- Sun
- Fire
- Ice
- Leaf
- Moon
- Shiny
- Thunder
- Water
- Dawn
- Dusk

</details>

<details>
<summary>Hardened Clay Ores</summary>

- Sun

</details>

<details>
<summary>Netherrack Ores</summary>

- Fire

</details>

<details>
<summary>Dripstone Ores</summary>

- Moon

</details>
